library.name: Free 2 B Me Practice Library
library.descriptor: Four books for people. Four books for practice. One coherent way of working.

person.title: IT SHOULDN'T BE THIS HARD
person.subtitle: The Hidden Cost of Living in Conditions That Don't Fit
person.promise: The difficulty is not proof that you have failed. It is information about conditions, access and fit.

practice.title: ACCESS BEFORE INTERVENTION
practice.subtitle: A Neuroaffirming Framework for Counselling, Positive Behaviour Support and Disability Practice
practice.promise: Create and protect access before interpreting reduced engagement, distress or behaviour as resistance or incapacity.

pairs.ne_application: Universal practice foundation across all four support streams.

pairs.territory: Behaviour, communication and quality of life

person.title: YOU MAKE SENSE
person.subtitle: A Rights-Based Guide to Distress, Communication and Support That Helps
person.promise: Your distress, communication and behaviour make sense in context. Support should improve quality of life, not erase who you are.

practice.title: BEHAVIOUR MAKES SENSE
practice.subtitle: Rights-Based Positive Behaviour Support Beyond Compliance
practice.promise: Deliver neuroaffirming Positive Behaviour Support from assessment and formulation through implementation, review and restrictive-practice reduction.

pairs.ne_application: Specialist Behaviour Support participant orientation, team education and professional partnerships.

person.title: NERVOUS SYSTEM NOURISHMENT
person.subtitle: Finding What Supports Your Brain and Body
person.promise: Explore what supports access beyond forced calm, stillness, body awareness or conventional regulation.

practice.title: BEYOND REGULATION
practice.subtitle: Nervous System Nourishment in Counselling and Positive Behaviour Support
practice.promise: Use evidence-graded, consent-led sensory, relational, communication, movement, rest and bodymind practices within professional scope.

pairs.ne_application: Neuroaffirming Counselling, Specialist Behaviour Support and Participation & Everyday Life.

pairs.territory: Self-determination, belonging and a life that fits

person.title: BUILT WITH YOU
person.subtitle: Why You Belong in the Design of Your Support and Your Life
person.promise: Your communication, body, interests, relationships, supports and real-life conditions belong inside the design.

practice.title: PRACTICE THAT HOLDS
practice.subtitle: Supervision, Teams and Systems for Neuroaffirming Practice
practice.promise: Build the supervision, workforce, evidence, digital access and organisational systems that keep neuroaffirming values alive in daily practice.

pairs.ne_application: Universal client welcome, participation and navigation; professional supervision, team and organisational relationships.

distribution_rules.optional: No client has to accept, read, finish or agree with a book to receive support.
distribution_rules.not_plan_funded: Complimentary welcome and relationship copies are not claimed from a participant's NDIS plan.
distribution_rules.not_referral_inducement: Professional copies are not linked to referrals, exclusivity or reciprocal benefit.
distribution_rules.service_boundary: Books do not replace service agreements, consent, rights information, complaints pathways, crisis information, assessment or current service information.

anthology_sources.chapter: I Am the Roar and the Rest: She Didn't Tame Herself to Be Understood
